name: Champy the Useless Vampire
short_description: Join Champy, the useless vampire, in this charming 2D point-and-click adventure with hand-drawn environments and funny puzzles. Embark on an adventure amongst a cult of vampire hunters, a giant octopus and zombie animals. Will Champy find a way to save Dracula before it's too late?
detailed_description:
Champy the Useless Vampire is a 2D hand-drawn point-and-click adventure game with a feel-good vibe and lots of crazy puzzles.

Meet Champy, the unconventional vampire who doesn't drink blood and only has one power, the ability to turn into a bat. After living a couple of decades in Paris, he is suddenly called into service by his family.

Champys grandfather, the once-mighty Dracula, is losing his immortality and powers. The years he has lived are rapidly catching up to him and threatens to end his existence rather quickly, setting the stage for a race against the clock.

Dracula's fear of being overthrown by the other vampires makes him turn to the only one he trusts, his useless grandson. Champy, recently being banished from Transylvania after a series of unfortunate incidents, leaps at the chance to redeem himself. 


Embark on an adventure amongst a cult of vampire hunters, a giant octopus and zombie animals. Will Champy find a way to save Dracula before it's too late?

Features


  • Classic point-and-click adventure game with a modern touch
  • Beautiful hand-drawn 2D environments and animated characters
  • 2h of solving creative and fun puzzles
  • Funny dialogues delivered by professional voice actors
  • Built in hint-system for your convenience
  • Subtitles available in english, german, spanish and swedish

supported_languages:
English*, German, Spanish - Spain, Swedish, French, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support
